channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham dies suddenly at 71
item.description: South Carolina Sen. Lindsey Graham, a close Trump ally and longtime advocate for U.S. military intervention, has died unexpectedly.

item.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes after IRGC declares Strait of Hormuz closed
item.description: The U.S. military conducted additional strikes on Iranian positions near the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday following an IRGC missile attack.

item.title: Iran's supreme leader says revenge will most certainly be carried out
item.description: Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei stated on Saturday that retaliation for his father's assassination is inevitable.

item.title: Graham Platner officially withdraws from Maine Senate race
item.description: Democrat Graham Platner filed paperwork on Friday to remove his name from the ballot, ending his campaign against Republican Sen. Susan Collins.
